description_long: This stool features a striking modern design with a combination of light wood and sleek, white metal elements. The seat and front legs are crafted from a single, smoothly curved wooden piece, while the backrest and rear support are formed from a continuous, angular metal frame. The backrest is minimalistic, providing a slim but functional support for the user. A black metal footrest bar is integrated beneath the seat, adding both stability and comfort. The overall silhouette is geometric and visually light, with clean lines and a distinctive Z-shaped profile. The materials and construction suggest durability and suitability for contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern stool with a curved wooden seat, white metal backrest, and integrated black footrest, featuring a geometric, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Z-shaped profile, white metal backrest, and the curved wooden seat and leg.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the flat wooden seat, black footrest bar, and the symmetry of the legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the Z-shaped profile and showing the continuous metal and wood construction.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the slim white metal backrest and the full width of the wooden seat.
